error_signature: relative dates default to incorrect year
title: Relative dates default to 2024 instead of current year
symptom: When creating Google Calendar events with relative dates, the year defaults to 2024 instead of the current year, leading to incorrect event creation.
applies_when: Using AI Agent to parse natural language for event creation
Relative dates like 'next Wednesday' are provided
not_this_if: The current year is set correctly in the system
root_cause: The AI Agent does not correctly interpret relative dates and defaults to a hardcoded year (2024) instead of using the current system year. This issue arises when the AI Agent processes natural language inputs without the current year context.
fix_steps: Add an Edit Fields node before the AI Agent node
Generate the current time in the Edit Fields node
Pass the current year to the AI Agent prompt using `{{$json.time}}`
agent_instruction: Insert an Edit Fields node to generate the current time and pass it to the AI Agent prompt.
